final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset)
    begin
        if (reset)
            count <= 4'b0000;
        else
            count <= count + 1;
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
